---
title: "TrajectoryList.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/components/TrajectoryList.tsx"
loc: 26
complexity: 4
logic_score: 6.52
style_score: 3.39
intel_score: 2.00
overall_score: 4.51
---

## Intent
React component rendering TrajectoryList.

## Interaction Protocol
Include <TrajectoryList /> within a React-Three-Fiber Canvas context.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://react)
- [Trajectory](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `TrajectoryList`
- `TrajectoryList`
